operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.clear-activation-lock-bypass-code
operations.role: Efface le code bypass d'activation lock
operations.abuse_vector: Permet de supprimer le cache du code bypass — combine avec fetch-* = re-attaque

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.fetch-activation-lock-bypass-code
operations.role: Recupere le code bypass d'activation lock officiel (Apple)
operations.abuse_vector: Cible principale iRemoval PRO — permet d'obtenir un code legit pour un device non supervise

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.fetch-unlock-token
operations.role: Recupere le token de deverrouillage officiel
operations.abuse_vector: Cible secondaire — permet d'activer un device bloque

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.erase-device
operations.abuse_vector: Si appele sur un device iRemoval-attaque, detruit les artefacts forensiques

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.lock-device
operations.abuse_vector: Outil de containment — peut-etre invoque legitime par MDM enterprise

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.remove-profile
operations.abuse_vector: Cleanup — peut-etre utilise pour effacer le profil enterprise

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.install-provisioning-profile
operations.abuse_vector: Similaire a install-profile, plus specifique dev

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.clear-device-passcode
operations.abuse_vector: Si appele SANS supervision = bypass de l'authentification utilisateur

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.clear-restrictions-password
operations.role: Supprime le mot de passe Restrictions

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.fetch-security-information
operations.abuse_vector: Reconnaissance — jailbreak status, passcode set, etc.

operations.name: com.apple.dmd.operation.schedule-os-update
operations.abuse_vector: Faible interet pour bypass — peut-etre utilise pour forcer upgrade pre-bypass
